hero.subtitle: TECH
hero.title: Building Reliable Solar Energy Systems
hero.desc: LIXMA focuses on solar system planning, engineering, construction, and long-term maintenance to help companies, schools, and public sites adopt clean energy with stable returns.

solar.desc: From rooftop and ground-mounted systems to building-integrated solar, we deliver efficient renewable energy projects through professional design and construction quality.

services.title: Our Services
services.desc: From early assessment, system design, and construction to maintenance, LIXMA provides an integrated service workflow for reliable solar projects.

items.title: Solar System Planning
items.desc: We provide site assessment, layout planning, and benefit estimation based on site conditions, energy needs, and investment goals.

items.title: Engineering and Construction
items.desc: We integrate structural, electrical, and construction management to ensure safety, stability, and long-term operation.

items.title: O&M Monitoring
items.desc: Monitoring and maintenance workflows help track generation performance and maintain stable returns and equipment lifespan.
